name_en: P [New] Hot-selling Linen Color, a touch of romantic Turkish style, a different fashion style for fabric! It is worth noting that the linen content of the developed linen material is much higher than market goods. If you don't know, a higher linen content means it is relatively more wear-resistant and looks better! Size: 28cm, Code 498894
